title: NavigatorOutput
description: Full output produced by the Navigator agent after a browsing session.

status.description: Overall completion status of the navigation session.

elapsed_seconds.description: Total elapsed time for the navigation session in seconds.

persona.description: Name or identifier of the persona used for this session.

scope.description: Optional scope or focus area for this navigation session.

agent_result.description: Backward-compatibility narrative summary produced by the agent.

manifest_coverage.description: Coverage of the expected page manifest.

expected_pages.description: Pages listed in the manifest that were expected to be visited.

visited.description: Pages from the manifest that were actually visited.

not_visited.description: Pages from the manifest that were not visited.

unexpected_pages.description: Pages visited that were not in the manifest.

pages.description: Detailed per-page observations captured during the session.

id.description: Unique identifier for this page visit.

url_visited.description: Actual URL visited for this page.

screenshot.description: File path or URL of the screenshot taken for this page.

description.description: Narrative description of what was observed on this page.

actions.description: Sequence of actions performed on this page.

step.description: Step number in the action sequence.

fields_seen.description: Form fields visible on this form.

submitted.description: Whether the form was submitted during the session.

network_log.description: Network requests captured while on this page.

auth_flow_verification.description: Observations about the authentication flow during the session.

auth_completed.description: Whether the authentication flow completed successfully.

auth_mechanism_observed.description: Description of the authentication mechanism observed (e.g. JWT, session cookie).

post_auth_access.description: Description of access state observed after authentication.

persistence_after_refresh.description: Description of auth persistence behavior after page refresh.

logout_test.description: Result of logout testing, or null if not tested.

experience.description: Persona's subjective experience of the application.

first_impression.description: Persona's first impression of the application.

easy.description: Things the persona found easy to do.

hesitation_points.description: Points where the persona hesitated or was unsure.

would_return.description: Whether the persona would return to use the application again.

would_recommend.description: Whether and why the persona would recommend the application.

screenshots.description: File paths or URLs of all screenshots taken during the session.

video.description: File path or URL of the session recording video, if captured.
